_README: Vetted ElevenLabs German voices for the ADVANCE project + the canonical EL settings. Voice IDs are usable via API only on a PAID plan (free tier blocks library voices). Used by skills advance-elevenlabs-narration / advance-elevenlabs-podcast.
output_format_note: pcm_24000 = raw 24kHz/16-bit/mono, used directly. On a tier without pcm, set an mp3_* format; tts_backends transcodes via ffmpeg.

pauses.method: ElevenLabs <break time="Xs" /> tags injected between sentences (scripts add_sentence_breaks; --pause-break flag). EL-only; Gemini can't parse the tag.

mastering.note: EL voices are clean/low-sibilance -> usually little/no de-essing. NEVER the 6-pass broadband ffmpeg deesser (pumps); see advance-tts-master.

female.name: Hatti - Calm & Slow
female.character: calm, slow (good for 60+, ~31s vs 20s on same text)

male.name: Christian - Calm & Soothing
male.use: CHOSEN COG narration + podcast male (Melanie's pick 2026-06-17)
